displacement.dominant_distortion_qubit_g: Kerr-induced phase drift (negligible for alpha < 2, T < 200 ns)
displacement.recommendation: For unconditional displacement: use fast pulses (T << 1/chi). For conditional displacement: exploit the chi-dependent fidelity.
displacement.regime_qubit_e: Breaks for |chi*T| > 0.03 cycles (T > 10 ns at chi=-2.84 MHz)

qubit_rotation.dominant_distortion: Fock-dependent rotation angle due to chi-shifted transition frequency
qubit_rotation.recommendation: Use shorter pulses for higher cavity occupation tolerance. DRAG improves n=0 fidelity but does not fix the Fock-dependent angle shift.
qubit_rotation.regime_spectator: Cavity is acceptable spectator for n < n_max(T)
